NCT00104299.label: Primary
NCT00104299.source: The New England journal of medicine
NCT00104299.text: Sixty-three patients in the rituximab group (64%) reached the primary end point, as compared with 52 patients in the control group (53%), a result that met the criterion for noninferiority (P<0.001).

NCT00128895.label: Outcome
NCT00128895.source: The New England journal of medicine
NCT00128895.text: A total of 25 patients in the rituximab group (76%) and 9 patients in the control group (82%) had a sustained remission (P=0.68).

NCT01731561.label: Outcome
NCT01731561.text: The HR for female athletes compared with the reference population was 2.56 (95% CI 1.22 to 5.37) in the univariable model and 3.67 (95% CI 1.71 to 7.87) after adjustment for hypertension.

NCT00987389.label: Outcome
NCT00987389.source: The New England journal of medicine
NCT00987389.text: RESULTS: Death from any cause or ESKD occurred in 100 of 352 patients (28.4%) in the plasma-exchange group and in 109 of 352 patients (31.0%) in the control group (hazard ratio, 0.86; 95% confidence interval [CI], 0.65 to 1.13; P = 0.27).
